name: implementation-plan
description: Machine-readable sibling of the implementation plan: goal, architecture summary, a phases array (each with tasks and tags), an acceptance-criteria array, and a validation-evidence array. The agent expands each exemplar element, one per item.

slots.description: Extra header meta (owner, target date, branch); one per array element.
Concrete outcome the plan produces, plus optional non-goals.
Phase timing label. The phases array carries one exemplar element to clone per phase.
Phase task text. The tasks array carries one exemplar element to clone per task.
Phase tag; one per array element.
Acceptance criterion text. The acceptanceCriteria array carries one exemplar element to clone per criterion.
Validation-evidence row label. The validationEvidence array carries one exemplar element to clone per row.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.phase[]: { when: string, name: string, description: string, tasks: task[], tags: string[] }
